channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Apple wants apps to integrate with Siri in iOS 27, but one fear holds some back: report  9to5Mac
  2. Apple Plans Customizable Camera for Pros, Siri Design Changes in iOS 27  Bloomberg.com
  3. iOS 27’s new design leak sounds a lot like what I’ve been wanting most  9to5Mac
  4. Apple Stock Is Gaining Today: What's Happening Behind The Scenes?  Yahoo Finance
  5. AI could make iOS 27 much bigger than the rumors suggest  Macworld

item.title: Why Apple is Putting Cameras in the New AirPods Pro 4 (Ultra) - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. Why Apple is Putting Cameras in the New AirPods Pro 4 (Ultra)  Geeky Gadgets
  2. Apple’s Camera-Equipped AirPods Reach Late Testing in AI Device Push  Bloomberg.com
  3. Beyond Audio: Why the AirPods Ultra’s New Infrared Sensors Are a Game-Changer  Geeky Gadgets
  4. The new AirPods prove Apple is still the king of design  PhoneArena
  5. Apple’s Incoming CEO Declares The Company Is “About To Change The World” As The Camera-Equipped AirPods Pro Take Shape  Wccftech

item.title: Why Valve is Releasing 4 Different Steam Machine Variants - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. Why Valve is Releasing 4 Different Steam Machine Variants  Geeky Gadgets
  2. Steam Machine Buyers Will Face a Queue System For Its 4 Models, as Valve Moves to Prevent Scalper Markups Early  Wccftech
  3. Update Hints Steam Machine Will Arrive in 512GB and 2TB Versions, Despite AI-led SSD Pricing Surge  Digital Foundry
  4. Valve reservation code reportedly references four Steam Machine packages  VideoCardz.com
  5. New Steam update shows four Steam Machine models, though we still don't have a release date  PC Gamer
